svg.title: Recruitment agent system — as implemented in production after gap-closure pass
svg.desc: Layout: Orchestrator vertical band on the left, Graphiti vertical substrate band on the right, pipeline stages 0-6 in the middle column. Solid colour fills throughout. All previously flagged divergences either closed (code change shipped) or reclassified per the project owner's direction.
svg.text: prod head: migration 084 · 287/287 tests · gaps closed: RoleIntent→graph · fitter→graph · exemplar overlay · single canonical version

g.text: every stage reads from + writes to Graphiti — the single source of truth for entity / event / outcome state
recruiter authors via UI/API → Postgres row → mirrored to Graphiti as RoleIntent node with HAS_INTENT / AUTHORED_BY edges
soft_signals · deal_breakers · growth_expectations · context_for_opening · weighting_notes · must_haves_missing_from_spec · free_text
drift_detect compares stated intent vs override-reason dimensions · superseded_id chain preserves history for audit
STAGE 1 — CHEAP SCORERS IN PARALLEL · LLM
decides per candidate: send_task (which template) · skip_task (artifacts sufficient) · request_artifacts (admit unknown)
scores templates by predictive_quality × √(min(n,30)/30) from task_calibrations · below 0.20 floor → request_artifacts
STAGE 3 — ASSESSMENT SCORING · ASYNC ON SUBMISSION · LLM
Sonnet · grades submission against role rubric · per-rubric breakdown + uncertainty
max_tokens 1024 · runs async — fires when submission arrives, not in the main cycle
pure-Python logistic regression + √n hierarchical pooling + isotonic calibration — simple model, pre-pilot appropriate
abstention overlay: per-agent uncertainty ≥0.5 · max-median spread >0.5 · calibrated-confidence floor 0.6
Approve (fires action) · Override (manual + attribution) · Teach (revert + failure_mode + attributed_to + direction)
decision row carries: active_capabilities · token_spend · idempotency_key run_id:app_id:type · two-admin co-sign for scope=org
advance_stage · reject_application · send_assessment · request_candidate_artifacts · queue_decision · approve/override/teach
same idempotent <action>.run() called by recruiter or agent · human is always actor of record
reached_interview · received_offer · hired · rejected_late · withdrew — written to Graphiti as HiringOutcome with RESULTED_IN edge
